◎简　　介  

　　Based on the New York Times best-selling Christmas novel by Wally Lamb comes the new Christmas classic, starring Molly Ringwald and featuring Chevy Chase as the narrator. Set in the 1960s, "Wishin’ and Hopin’" is the story of 10-year-old Felix Funicello (Wyatt Ralff, "The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby"), who is doing his best to navigate fifth grade at St. Aloysius Gonzaga Par...
